creator: benoit@guillemaud.fr
text:
Hello,

Bazarr v1.4.3 was released on 2024-06-02.

https://github.com/morpheus65535/bazarr/releases/tag/v1.4.3

I'd love to provide a .patch file with this report, but don't know how. If somehow could point me to the procedure to follow to build those, I'd appreciate it.

Regards
